bird.summary: The striped flufftail (Sarothrura affinis) is a species of bird in the flufftail family Sarothruridae. It is also known as the red-tailed f…

locations.name: 安东·赖歇诺
locations.summary: 安东·赖歇诺（德語：Anton Reichenow，1847年8月1日—1941年7月6日）是德国鳥類學家和爬虫两栖类学家。 生平 安东·赖歇诺是德国鸟类研究学家吉恩·路易斯·卡巴尼斯的女婿，1874年至1921年在柏林自然博物馆长期工作…

locations.name: 凡波斯
locations.summary: 凡波斯（南非語：fynbos，荷蘭語發音：[ˈfəinbɒs]，英語化發音：/ˈfeɪnbɒs/），指南非西開普省及東開普省沿海山區的天然灌木植被帶，屬於地中海型氣候冬季多雨區的硬葉植被。凡波斯是開普植物區的主體，生態上歸入地中海森林、疏…

relations.subject: Striped flufftail
relations.evidence: antonii, named for German ornithologist Anton Reichenow, is found in eastern Zimbabwe and Mozambique, Malawi, southern Tanzania, Kenya and the south of South Sudan.Taylor, B

relations.subject: Striped flufftail
relations.evidence: In South Africa, at lower altitudes, it is found in fynbos. left|thumb The striped flufftail feeds on a range of insects including beetles, caterpillars, ants, termites, flies, crickets and bugs, as well as spiders and seeds

relations.subject: Striped flufftail
relations.evidence: The species is mostly found in alpine grasslands, usually near water, and requires good cover with some clear ground
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
